title: Feature REQ - Monday Docs - better doc file naming

posts.author: Vadim (Vadim Martianov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Finding myself creating a lot of Monday Docs from the Item menu, each item has its own Monday Doc in it.
Now when comments are created in the Monday Docs, an email is sent by the system to the mentioned user.
If the Monday Docs has its default name which is “monday doc” the email doesn’t make any sense, because it’s not possible to find the docs you were mentioned on from the email or notifications, again we use a lot of these docs.
The manual solution is to rename the docs when it’s created, sure.
Would like to request that these docs when created, will inherit their Item Name instead of the default ‘monday doc’ naming.

Hope this makes sence.

Best.
Vadim
